name: G-4 migrate-rubric: a rule lacking provenance.source is rejected because namespace routing depends on it
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-orphan
    provenance: []
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'provenance.source is required' err.txt && echo provenance_required 1>&2
